creator: novel@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I appreciate your attention to the conky port and the conky itself, but 
such kind of a bugs should be reported upstream (i.e. to conky 
developers): 

http://sourceforge.net/projects/conky/ 

There's a bugtracker on the project's site. This problem can be 
discussed on the conky IRC channel as well: #conky on Freenode.
